steps.title: Focus on juxtaposition
steps.content: The underlined claim says Tokarczuk's novel resembles magical realism because it places realistic representation together with Polish folklore. The best support should show folklore entering into and disrupting an otherwise realistic plot.

steps.title: Reject weaker support
steps.content: A mainly labels the novel as indebted to folklore. C says modes alternate, not that they are juxtaposed. D adds Latin American influence but does not directly show realism and folklore working together. The answer is B.
